titles.title: All You Need When You Need It

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know your heart sees no way out As you face the shadows of your doubt A trial that you know, you can′t run from You dread the pain you feel tomorrow Not sure that you'll survive the sorrow You knew a time like this would surely come But just hold on It wont be long

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You′ll have all you need when you need it Though for now you just can't see it When your ready to receive it Grace will overflow Put your fear on the alter and leave it Walk on by faith and believe it You'll have all you need when you need it I know

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: One day soon you′ll understand How all of this was in Gods plan And how he gave you strength for every mile And as the pages keep on turning You′ll look back upon the journey And see he was all you needed all the while But until then, I'll remind you again

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Put your fear on the alter and leave it Walk on by faith and believe it You′ll have all you need when you need it I know
